description: Hidden-service SLO contract for deriving join/reliability counters and ratios from JSONL observability events.

event_envelope.field_name_note: Selectors and derivations in this contract MUST use emitted JSONL field names exactly: event, status, error_code, metrics, join_latency_ms.

hs.rdv_joined.join_latency_ms.description: Latency distribution for successful rendezvous joins.

rdv_join_success_rate.description: Share of join attempts that end in status=ok.

rdv_join_failure_rate.description: Share of join attempts that end in status=error.

timeout_error_rate_over_errors.description: Timeout-tagged errors as a fraction of join failures (bounded denominator).

join_failure_rate_warning_10m.description: Warning if rendezvous join failure rate is above 5% over 10 minutes.

join_failure_rate_critical_5m.description: Critical if rendezvous join failure rate is above 10% over 5 minutes.

intro_poll_failures_consecutive_critical.description: Critical if one service emits 3 or more consecutive intro-poll failures.

intro_poll_failure_rate_warning_15m.description: Warning if intro-poll failures exceed 2% of intro polls over 15 minutes.

timeout_errors_repeated_warning_10m.description: Warning if timeout errors for one service occur 5 or more times in 10 minutes.

timeout_errors_repeated_critical_10m.description: Critical if timeout errors for one service occur 10 or more times in 10 minutes.

compatibility.event_addition_policy: Forward-compatible with additive event fields and new event names: unknown fields/events MUST be ignored unless explicitly referenced by selectors.
compatibility.breaking_change_policy: Any rename/removal of event, status, error_code, metrics, or join_latency_ms requires a contract_version major bump.
compatibility.recommended_migration: Add new selectors/counters/ratios for new events first, then increment minor version when existing behavior is unchanged.
